en: Hey Jane. Hey Emily. I'm having some trouble sharing my screen in the Zoom meeting.
ko: 안녕 Jane 안녕 Emily Zoom 회의에서 화면 공유가 안 돼

en: I can't figure out what's going on. Okay, did you try leaving and then rejoining?
ko: 뭐가 문제인지 모르겠어 나갔다가 다시 들어가 봤어? 응 여전히 안 돼 그냥 멈춰

en: Yeah, still nothing. It just freezes.
ko: 내 컴퓨터로 슬라이드 공유해줄까? 정말 좋겠다 내가 설명할게

en: Okay, do you want me to share the slides from my computer?
ko: 파일 보내줘 지금 보내는 중이야 살려줘서 고마워 별말을 누구나

en: That would be amazing. I'll talk through them.
Okay, just send me the file. I'm doing it right now.
Thanks for saving me. No problem. Happens to everyone.
